title: The Spiritual Meaning of Black death in Dreams

cosmicAnalysis: Dreams of Black death are deeply connected to the lunar cycle. During the **Waxing Moon**, this symbol suggests growth and the accumulation of black death-energy in your waking life. A **Full Moon** dream of Black death signifies a moment of peak clarity—the unconscious is fully illuminated.
